sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n82897" key="phdaliou=xos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">πηδαλι-οῦχος</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, (<etym lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="etym">ἔχω</etym>) <sense id="n82897.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">steersman</tr_>: metaph., <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">ruler</tr_>, ib. <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0018.tlg001:145" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">145</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
